collision energy: using a normalized collision energy of 25%
enrichment method: using titanium dioxide (GL Sciences Inc, Tokyo, Japan)
instrument: LC-MS/MS measurements were performed on a QExactive Plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: NanoESI spray voltage was set to 2.3 kV
reduction reagent: with freshly added protease or phosphatase inhibitors, and homogenized by using a pellet pestle
